music_v1.description: music_v1 — text prompt to complete song generation
music_v1.pricingNotes: ElevenLabs music generation is estimated at the published per-minute API reference rate. Subscription inclusions, discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

music-2.6.description: music-2.6 — full song generation from prompt and lyrics with instrumental mode
music-2.6.pricingNotes: MiniMax music estimates use published per-track and lyrics-generation rates for the selected model. Free-tier model generation remains zero-cost for the base track while lyric generation is priced; discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

music-2.6-free.description: music-2.6-free — free-tier full song generation from prompt and lyrics with lower rate limits
music-2.6-free.pricingNotes: MiniMax music estimates use published per-track and lyrics-generation rates for the selected model. Free-tier model generation remains zero-cost for the base track while lyric generation is priced; discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

lyria-3-clip-preview.description: Lyria 3 Clip Preview — 30-second text-to-music clips with MP3 output
lyria-3-clip-preview.pricingTier: Gemini API paid Standard Lyria pricing
lyria-3-clip-preview.pricingNotes: Gemini Lyria estimates use published per-track prices for the selected preview model. Free tier, priority pricing, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

lyria-3-pro-preview.description: Lyria 3 Pro Preview — full song generation with MP3 output
lyria-3-pro-preview.pricingTier: Gemini API paid Standard Lyria pricing
lyria-3-pro-preview.pricingNotes: Gemini Lyria estimates use published per-track prices for the selected preview model. Free tier, priority pricing, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.
